name: funnel
description: Evaluate funnel slides — staged conversion flows with visible drop-off and conversion proof
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with clear stage narrowing, explicit conversion math, and a decisive headline insight

prompts.text: Build a sales funnel slide with Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, and Closed Won stages showing volume, conversion rate, and biggest drop-off
Build a recruiting funnel slide from Applicants to Screen to Interview to Offer to Accepted with stage conversion rates and one short improvement takeaway
